name: Ubiquiti UniFi U7 Pro
title: Ubiquiti UniFi U7 Pro
title_extended: Ubiquiti UniFi U7 Pro Access Point – WiFi 7 High-Performance AP

detailed_description.heading: Unmatched WiFi Performance
detailed_description.text: U7-Pro is a high-performance WiFi 7 access point that delivers blazing-fast speeds and comprehensive coverage for demanding, large-scale environments. Powered by WiFi 7 technology, the U7-Pro features three radios with 6 spatial streams, enabling it to achieve throughput speeds of up to 9.3 Gbps. This makes it ideal for supporting even the most demanding applications. The U7-Pro also supports the new 6 GHz frequency band, which is less congested than the 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands. This can help to significantly improve performance and reduce interference, especially in crowded environments. With its 140 m² coverage area and support for up to 300+ connected devices, the U7-Pro is a powerful and versatile solution for a wide range of applications.

detailed_description.heading: Centralized Management and Comprehensive Security
detailed_description.text: Manage your U7-Pro and other UniFi devices effortlessly using the UniFi Network controller. This centralized platform provides a comprehensive view of your network, allowing you to configure settings, monitor performance, and troubleshoot issues from a single point of access. The U7-Pro requires a UniFi Network controller running version 8.0.7 and later. It is also compatible with UniFi OS version 3.2 and later. Protect your network and devices from unauthorized access with the U7-Pro's robust security features. It supports industry-leading WPA3 encryption, which provides advanced protection against modern security threats. Additionally, RADIUS authentication enables you to control access to your network based on user credentials.

detailed_description.heading: Elevate Your Wireless Experience
detailed_description.text: Ubiquiti U7-Pro is the perfect solution that can handle the demands of your business. With its exceptional performance, comprehensive security, and centralized management, the U7-Pro is the foundation for a robust and responsive network that can handle even the most demanding workloads. The U7-Pro's low latency ensures that your connections remain stable and responsive, even when multiple devices are sharing the network. Its advanced MU-MIMO technology intelligently manages multiple data streams simultaneously, minimizing congestion and optimizing performance.

detailed_description.heading: Compare with similar products
detailed_description.text: The Access Point U7 Pro is compared with Access Point U7 Lite, Access Point U7 Long Range, Access Point U7 Pro XG, and Access Point U7 Pro XGS across WiFi Generation, Spatial Stream, WiFi Technology, Radio Rates, Antenna range, Ethernet Ports, Dimensions, Weight, and Max Power Consumption.
